theme: Light Theme Primary with Dark Navy Accents
vibe: Premium, modern, B2B tech, authoritative, reliable

typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight text-balance

grid_patterns.pricing: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-8 max-w-5xl mx-auto

surface_styles.card_light: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow
surface_styles.glass_header: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-slate-200/50 sticky top-0 z-50

components.navbar: Glassmorphism header, sticky top-0. Logo left, links center, CTA right. Mobile hamburger menu required.
components.hero: Dark overlay background using fiber optic bg. Apply gradient overlay (from-[#0A1A33]/90 to-[#0A1A33]/50) to ensure text contrast. Strong H1. Primary CTA button.
components.stats_strip: 4-column grid. Dark Navy background. Large numbers in Electric Blue, small labels in white/slate-300.
components.services_card: Light surface card. Phosphor icon in Electric Blue. Title in dark text, description in muted text. Subtle hover lift (-translate-y-1).
components.pricing_card: 3 cards: Basic, Premium, Ultra. Premium is scaled slightly larger (scale-105 on md+), has Electric Blue border, and 'POPULAR' badge. Display 'Contact for Pricing' instead of specific amounts.
components.cta_banner: Dark Navy background with subtle glowing gradient accent in the corners. Large text urging to connect.
components.contact_form: Use Shadcn UI Input, Textarea, and Button. Clean, white background form inside a light surface card.
components.footer: Dark background (#051024). Logo, 3 columns of links, address/contact details.

hero_bg.description: Glowing fiber optic cables for high-speed network hero

services_bg.description: Server room for network and cloud services

about_team.description: Corporate team meeting for about page

city_skyline.description: Modern city skyline representing Bhopal local presence

brand_assets.logo_styling: Text-based logo. 'insight' in Dark Navy (#0A1A33) with small right-arrow accent dot above 'i'. 'NETWORKS' in spaced lighter tracking below. Tagline 'CONNECTING TODAY. POWERING TOMORROW.' small beneath.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure white text on #0A1A33 has >4.5:1 contrast.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Initialize React Router for multi-page navigation: Home, Services, Plans, About, Contact.
Implement Lenis smooth scrolling for premium feel.
Create the styled text logo as per 'brand_assets' since the image logo will be provided separately by the user.
Use Phosphor Icons for all service and feature icons.
Ensure 'Contact for Pricing' is used on all pricing plans instead of numbers.
Build the hero section with the provided fiber optic image, applying a heavy dark navy gradient overlay to ensure text is highly readable.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements for automated testing.
